shaliach.name: Shaliach
shaliach.role: Protocol counsel and enforcement system for SOP, SJS, DataDrivenDesign, lineage, uncertainty, and artifact form.

manager.name: Manager
manager.role: Owns objective integrity, layer approval, work slicing, implementation review, and final acceptance.

directors.name: SystemsDirector
directors.role: Produces structured flow-control architecture and keeps the objective decomposable.

directors.name: FailureDirector
directors.role: Finds missing requirements, boundary mistakes, risk, failure modes, and premature code-level detail.

programmers.name: Programmer
programmers.role: Writes bounded implementation slices only from approved code-layer package authority.
